docs.title: Banyan — hierarchical self-compounding agent harness for Claude Code
docs.reason: Top-level project README covering install, quickstart, workflow descriptions, and repository layout — feeds CLAUDE.md.

docs.title: Agent Instructions — Banyan contributor and authoring contract
docs.reason: Canonical repo instruction file with authoring rules, working agreement, vendoring policy, and contribution conventions — feeds CLAUDE.md.

docs.title: CLAUDE.md (shim)
docs.reason: Single-line stub containing only '@AGENTS.md'; no independent content to classify.

docs.title: docs/ directory overview
docs.reason: Short directory-layout README describing brainstorms, decisions, plans, harness-proposals, and runtime artifact directories — feeds CLAUDE.md orientation.

docs.title: Decision: new plugin skeleton that harvests v1's leaf assets (not a fork, not pure greenfield)
docs.reason: Accepted ADR in decisions/ with explicit status: accepted, documenting the architectural choice to vendor leaf agents from compound-engineering rather than forking or rebuilding from scratch.

docs.title: Harness changelog
docs.reason: Changelog / audit log of applied harness changes; the CHANGELOG skip rule applies — git is the authoritative record of what changed.

docs.title: Review personas directory README
docs.reason: Directory README explaining the persona file format and how to contribute personas; no when: key so it is never spawned as a persona itself — feeds CLAUDE.md contributor guidance.

docs.title: eval/ directory overview
docs.reason: Short directory README describing the review-ab evaluation harness structure and how to run it — feeds CLAUDE.md contributor orientation.

docs.title: A/B evaluation protocol: Banyan /bn-review vs compound-engineering /ce-code-review
docs.reason: Detailed evaluation methodology with durable GO/NO-GO criteria, scoring rubric, metric definitions, and benchmark design decisions — architectural decisions about how the review subtree is validated are durable knowledge; the protocol narrative feeds CLAUDE.md.

docs.title: A/B scorecard template
docs.reason: Fill-in template form with placeholder values only; no durable content — template files are excluded under the generated/template skip rule.

docs.title: Review A/B scorecard — filled results
docs.reason: Filled evaluation results artifact living under a results/ output directory; primarily captured run data and a one-time verdict rather than reusable doctrine — skip as raw evaluation output.

docs.title: scripts/ — development and maintenance scripts
docs.reason: Dev-loop setup README documenting the PowerShell scripts, their purposes, and the typical development workflow — feeds CLAUDE.md contributor setup.
